method.engine: Independent Poisson from final xG, 0-0 to 5-5 matrix with tail above matrix retained.

method.tactical_treatment: Tactics-coach package is available and absorbed with conservative caps.
method.tail_treatment: Low-event draw floors and favorite ceiling tails are expressed through final xG and explicit tail-shape notes; no unsupported manual matrix mass injection.

factor_inputs.tactical_matchup: 英格兰的优势是 Kane-Bellingham 核心、Saka/Foden/Palmer 多点创造、Rice 屏障和定位球；但 L组第三轮 2-0 巴拿马提醒：破低位/高压混合防守前60分钟并不轻松。刚果金则以中低位、身体、Wissa/Silas/Bakambu 转换和 Mbemba 定位球为主要路径，K组第三轮 3-1 乌兹别克斯坦验证了必须赢时的后段加速。
